title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 178.600 - State treasurer to be custodian of funds — disbursement
text:
178.600.  State treasurer to be custodian of funds — disbursement. — The state treasurer is designated and appointed custodian of all moneys received by the state from appropriations made by the Congress of the United States for the vocational rehabilitation of persons disabled in industry or otherwise, and may receive and provide for the proper custody of the moneys and may make disbursements therefrom upon the order of the state board of education.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 13-60) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 § 162.290)
